name: symbols-mcp
description: MCP server for Symbols.app — code generation, project management, and publishing

tools.name: get_project_rules
tools.description: Returns mandatory Symbols.app rules. Call this first before any code generation.

tools.name: search_symbols_docs
tools.description: Search the Symbols documentation knowledge base for relevant information.

tools.name: generate_component
tools.description: Generate a Symbols.app DOMQL v3 component from a description with full context.

tools.name: generate_page
tools.description: Generate a Symbols.app page with routing integration and full context.

tools.name: convert_react
tools.description: Convert React/JSX code to Symbols.app DOMQL v3 with migration context.

tools.name: convert_html
tools.description: Convert raw HTML/CSS to Symbols.app DOMQL v3 components with full context.

tools.name: convert_to_json
tools.description: Convert DOMQL v3 JavaScript source code to platform JSON format for save_to_project.

tools.name: audit_component
tools.description: Audit a Symbols/DOMQL component for v3 compliance with deterministic rule checking.

tools.name: detect_environment
tools.description: Detect project type: local, CDN, JSON runtime, or remote server.

tools.name: get_cli_reference
tools.description: Returns the complete Symbols CLI (@symbo.ls/cli) command reference.

tools.name: get_sdk_reference
tools.description: Returns the complete Symbols SDK (@symbo.ls/sdk) API reference.

tools.name: login
tools.description: Log in to Symbols platform and get an access token.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List the user's Symbols projects (names, keys, IDs).

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create a new Symbols project on the platform.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get a project's current data (components, pages, design system).

tools.name: save_to_project
tools.description: Save components/pages/data to a project — creates a new version with changes, schema, and orders.

tools.name: publish
tools.description: Publish a version of a Symbols project (make it live).

tools.name: push
tools.description: Deploy a project to an environment (production, staging, dev).

prompts.name: symbols_component_prompt
prompts.text: Generate a Symbols.app DOMQL v3 component with the given description and component name.

prompts.name: symbols_migration_prompt
prompts.text: Migrate code from the specified source framework to Symbols.app DOMQL v3.

prompts.name: symbols_project_prompt
prompts.text: Scaffold a complete Symbols.app project based on the given description.

prompts.name: symbols_review_prompt
prompts.description: Review Symbols/DOMQL code for v3 compliance
prompts.text: Review the current Symbols/DOMQL code for v3 compliance and best practices.

prompts.name: symbols_convert_html_prompt
prompts.text: Convert HTML/CSS code to Symbols.app DOMQL v3 components.

prompts.name: symbols_design_review_prompt
prompts.description: Visual/design audit against the design system
prompts.text: Perform a visual and design audit of components against the Symbols design system.
